title: CT11.N09 completed discharge record — Admission reject — additivity not certified
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT11.N09, the audit gate node “Admission reject — additivity not certified” of tactic CT11 (Localization). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT11.N09. It must be exactly `CT11`, selecting Localization (localization) as the tactic that owns the audit gate step “Admission reject — additivity not certified” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Admission reject — additivity not certified”. It must be exactly `CT11.N09` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT11.N09 within tactic CT11 (Localization). It must be exactly 9, matching the N09 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT11.N09. It must be exactly `rejected`, meaning that the proposed invocation has failed admission and its defect has been recorded for the audit gate obligation “Admission reject — additivity not certified”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT11.N09. The array must contain `A-Admission`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Admission reject — additivity not certified”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `A-Admission` to occur in CT11.N09's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that records why an invocation is rejected and links the failed conditions to the defect register for the obligation “Admission reject — additivity not certified”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT11.N09 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: A-Admission (invocationRef, failedConditions, defectRegisterRef, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `A-Admission` evidence instance at CT11.N09. It must be exactly `A-Admission`, identifying the contract that records why an invocation is rejected and links the failed conditions to the defect register; the same instance must supply invocationRef, failedConditions, defectRegisterRef, evidence.

statement.informal: Audit or verify: Admission reject — additivity not certified

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
